ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the employee's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the department is based */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department's responsibilities and goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the manager oversees */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the manager */,
  "office_extension" TEXT /* Office extension of the manager */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the manager's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned in the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of performance review (e.g., Annual, Mid-Year) */,
  "objectives_met" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee met their objectives */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Areas for improvement identified during the review */,
  "training_recommendations" TEXT /* Training recommendations for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor leading the training */,
  "instructor_email" TEXT /* Email of the instructor */,
  "instructor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the training is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of employee training */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or score the employee received for the training */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the employee about the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_forms" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback form */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Job Satisfaction, Training Feedback) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the employee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the employee */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up action is required based on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_records" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom the salary belongs */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonuses received by the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary record became effective */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payment (e.g., Monthly, Bi-Weekly) */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Number of overtime hours worked */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Amount paid for overtime */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Tax deductions applied to the salary */,
  "net_salary" REAL /* Net salary after deductions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the office location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code or postal code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_locations" (
  "employee_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of employee location */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the location */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the employee is assigned to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started at the location */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the location (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_locations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the employee's account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the employee in the organization */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Locked, Inactive) */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "action_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
